summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a comprehensive coverage of the attribute schema, with all modes represented. However, there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented styles that could affect diversity.
recommendations: Encourage more variation in the emotional tone to reduce overrepresentation of emotional and formal styles.
Introduce more edge cases and rare scenarios to enhance diversity.
Ensure that each intent is represented with unique phrasing to minimize near-duplicates.
